title: Linai's Sunny Shore Adventure
description: Linai drifts along two glittering beaches, meeting a charming prince and a graceful princess under the warm sun.

acts.approachText: Linai floats lazily along a golden sandy beach, her translucent body shimmering with warm amber and peach tones that mirror the bright sunshine above. She drifts close to the shoreline where gentle waves lap the sand, her vapor trails curling with curiosity. Suddenly she spots a prince standing at the water's edge, his cape fluttering in the sea breeze. He seems to be searching for something in the tide pools, looking puzzled and a little forlorn. Linai's eyes widen with gentle delight and she pulses a soft golden glow, drifting closer by degrees, drawn in by the mystery of what he is looking for. She hovers just behind him, her internal patterns shifting into tiny curious swirls, wondering how best to get his attention and offer a friendly greeting.

choices.label: Glow brightly to catch his eye
choices.outcomeText: Linai expands her body and radiates a warm, brilliant golden light that dances across the wet sand and tide pools like sunlight on water. The prince turns, startled at first, then breaks into a wide smile as he sees the glowing ecto-cloud hovering cheerfully before him. He laughs and holds up the tiny starfish he had been searching for — it had been hiding under a shimmer of light all along. Linai's internal patterns burst into cascading sparkles of pure delight, her vapor trails lifting with buoyancy as the two share a warm, wordless moment of connection. The prince gives a grateful bow and Linai pulses a happy farewell glow before drifting onward down the beach, her body bright and full.

choices.label: Drift around him in circles
choices.outcomeText: Linai decides to orbit the prince in wide, enthusiastic loops, her vapor trails spinning out behind her like a little comet. The prince, still focused on the tide pool, does not notice at first — and then, when he finally looks up, he steps back in surprise and accidentally sits down in a shallow puddle of seawater with a tremendous splash. He blinks, looks at his soaked cape, then looks at Linai with a bewildered expression. Linai freezes mid-float, both eyes going perfectly round and flat in a classic 'I did not mean for that to happen' expression. She droops slightly, trails sagging with sheepishness, and the two stare at each other for a long beat before the prince starts laughing. It is warm but a little soggy — Linai decides to try a different approach.

acts.approachText: Linai drifts away from the golden beach and follows the coastline as the sand gradually shifts to a cooler, pale blue-white hue and the ocean deepens into rich sapphire tones. The sun still blazes warmly overhead, casting diamond sparkles across the blue water. On this new beach, Linai discovers a princess sitting on a smooth rock near the shoreline, carefully arranging a collection of beautiful blue sea glass into a pattern in the sand. The princess hums softly to herself, fully absorbed in her art. Linai hovers at a respectful distance, her body shifting to cool cerulean and soft lavender tones to match the blue beach's palette. Her internal patterns settle into gentle swirls of admiration — the sea glass arrangement is genuinely beautiful and Linai is moved by it. She wants to participate or express her appreciation, but she is not sure how to join without disturbing the careful work.

choices.label: Pulse soft blue light over the glass
choices.outcomeText: Linai settles into a slow, steady hover just above the sea glass arrangement and begins to pulse a gentle, cool blue-white light downward, making each piece of glass glow from within like tiny lanterns. The sand around the arrangement lights up in shifting blue patterns, turning the princess's artwork into something even more magical than before. The princess looks up slowly, her eyes wide with wonder, and then she smiles — a full, genuine smile of someone whose work has just been understood and celebrated. She adds one final piece of sea glass to the center of the pattern and the two of them hover and sit together in quiet, warm companionship as the blue waves roll in. Linai's body expands softly, her internal sparkles drifting outward like tiny stars, and her vapor trails settle into long, contented ribbons beneath her. The sunny blue beach holds them both in a perfect, peaceful moment.

choices.label: Envelop a piece of sea glass
choices.outcomeText: Linai drifts forward eagerly and envelops one of the prettiest pieces of blue sea glass in her ecto-cloud body, meaning to lift it and place it somewhere even more prominent in the arrangement. However, the glass is slippery and cool inside her form, and as she rises it slips through her translucent body and drops back onto the sand — right in the middle of the carefully arranged pattern, scattering several pieces in a small cascade. Linai freezes. The princess stares at her scattered sea glass. Linai's eyes go wide and her body contracts to about half its normal size in pure mortified embarrassment, her glow flickering an apologetic pink. The princess blinks once, twice, then lets out a surprised laugh and begins rearranging the pieces — this time into an even better pattern. Linai droops with sheepish relief and decides to try expressing herself a little more gently.
